content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding for No-Code Builders
content.seo_description: Learn to implement user onboarding to overcome no-coding barriers. A student-focused guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional flows.
content.answer_block: User onboarding is the bridge between a visitor and a loyal user. Even without traditional coding skills, you can leverage AI-assisted tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to build interactive, step-by-step walkthroughs. This guide empowers you to transform basic concepts into high-converting, professional-grade user experiences for your first portfolio project.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank screen, the weight of your first SaaS project pressing down. The ambition is there, but the syntax errors feel like a brick wall. You have the vision, but the technical gap between 'idea' and 'live app' feels like an abyss, especially when it comes to guiding users through your product.

But the era of the 'AI Builder' has arrived. You don't need a computer science degree to engineer a sophisticated onboarding flow. By using high-level abstractions like Antigravity and the recursive power of Claude Code, you can architect experiences that make your app feel polished, intentional, and enterprise-ready from day one.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Map
steps.description: Before writing code, map out exactly where the user starts and their 'Aha!' moment. We focus on reducing friction in the first 60 seconds.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a UX architect. Create a structured JSON schema for a 3-step user onboarding flow that includes a welcome modal, a feature highlight tooltip, and a final 'get started' call to action.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review the JSON schema for onboarding; create a React component structure to render these steps conditionally.'

steps.title: Build the State Management Logic
steps.description: Onboarding needs to track progress so users don't see the same tooltips twice. We implement a lightweight hook to handle this state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a custom React hook named useOnboarding that persists the current step index to localStorage and exposes a nextStep and skipTutorial function.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a new file src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts and implement the logic using the generated schema.'

steps.title: Engineer Interactive Tooltips
steps.description: Tooltips provide context without overwhelming the user. We build these to be responsive and accessible.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a reusable Tooltip component using Tailwind CSS that accepts 'title', 'content', and 'position' props, ensuring it renders correctly on mobile devices.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Build the Tooltip.tsx component and integrate it into the main App layout.'

steps.title: Orchestrate the Animation Layer
steps.description: Smooth transitions between onboarding steps make your app feel premium rather than 'beta'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a Framer Motion configuration to animate the appearance and exit of onboarding modals with a fade-in-up effect.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Install framer-motion and update the OnboardingProvider to use the animation config.'

steps.title: Implement Analytics Hooks
steps.description: You need to know where users drop off. We add simple event tracking to your onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an event tracking wrapper that logs onboarding completion rates to a console or a mock API endpoint whenever a user clicks 'Finish'.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Integrate the analytics tracker into the final step of the onboarding flow and verify with a test log.'

pro_tips: Always prioritize the 'Aha!' moment; don't make users click through more than 3 steps before they see value.
Use 'Dismiss' buttons liberally; forced onboarding is the fastest way to increase churn.
Leverage Claude Code to write unit tests for your onboarding state; it catches edge cases like 'back' button navigation errors.
Keep your copy punchy and benefit-driven; don't describe what a button does, describe what the user gains by clicking it.
Test your onboarding on a mobile emulator; 70% of your users will experience the first version on a small screen.
content.next_steps: After completing your onboarding flow, deploy your project to Vercel and share the link in our community showcase channel for peer review and feedback.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the technical blueprint to build professional onboarding flows that turn visitors into power users. Don't let the 'no-code' label stop you; you are an engineer of your own destiny. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
